de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction

Interface Member

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ClassType, Constructor, Field, Method
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ArrayDeclaration, ClassDeclaration, ConstructorDeclaration, DefaultConstructor, EnumClassDeclaration, FieldSpecification, ImplicitFieldSpecification, InterfaceDeclaration, MethodDeclaration, NullType, SuperArrayDeclaration, TypeDeclaration

    public interface Member
extends ProgramModelElement
    A program model element representing members.
